## Description
*What UX or accessibility enhancement does this PR introduce?*

## UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Used correct tags (button, nav, etc.)
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav:** All interactions reachable via Tab
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Added for icon-only buttons
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Checked for readability
- [ ] **Focus States:** Visible indicators present
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** Works on multiple screen sizes
